docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED. MATTER CONTINUED TO JANUARY 30, 2017 AT 1:30 FOR NEW TRIAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HAIDER, MEHER HEARING SET FOR NOV-30-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIE CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE PRESENT IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK; S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2017 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLURMAN, BRYAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HAIDER, MEHER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED SEP-07-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HAIDER, MEHER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BRYAN CLURMAN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $767.00 FILED BY CLURMAN, BRYAN AS TO DEFENDANT HAIDER, MEHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLURMAN, BRYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAIDER, MEHER $767.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $852.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MEHER HAIDER IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JAN-30-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MEHER HAIDER. DEFENDANT REQUESTS BAILIFF FOR NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
